title: analyzer-conventional plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the analyzer-conventional semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_COMMITS.description: JSON-encoded array of raw commit message strings since the last release tag. Populated automatically by semrel core.
examples: ["feat: add dark mode", "fix(ui): correct button alignment"]

notes: This plugin has no user-configurable SEMREL_PLUGIN_* env vars in schema v1.
The commit type-to-bump mapping is hard-coded to the Conventional Commits convention:
- feat â†’ minor, feat! / BREAKING CHANGE â†’ major
- fix, perf, refactor, revert, chore â†’ patch
- docs, style, test, ci â†’ no-release
